page.title: Template:People by nationality and century category header/doc

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:People by nationality and century category header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:People by nationality and century category header/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:People by nationality and century category header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:People by nationality and century category header/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:People by nationality and century category header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:People by nationality and century category header/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Intricate template}} == General Usage == This template is used to categorize diffusing categories for people by their nationality and century on category pages. It ''should'' produce the correct links and categories for the specific country and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== General Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == This template should only be used on category pages. Make sure the title of the category page includes the demonym and century so that the template can correctly infer these values. Right now, the category isn't smart enough to handle some redirected categories. In those cases, wrapping the template with <nowiki>{{suppress categories| TEMPLATE}}</nowiki> is one temporary workaround.
== See also == {{Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line --> [[Category:People by nationality and century| ]] [[Category:Occupation category header templates| ]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Intricate template}} == General Usage == This template is used to categorize diffusing categories for people by their nationality and century on category pages. It ''should'' produce the correct links and categories for the specific country and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== General Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == This template should only be used on category pages. Make sure the title of the category page includes the demonym and century so that the template can correctly infer these values. Right now, the category isn't smart enough to handle some redirected categories. In those cases, wrapping the template with <nowiki>{{suppress categories| TEMPLATE}}</nowiki> is one temporary workaround.
== See also == {{Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line --> [[Category:People by nationality and century| ]] [[Category:Occupation category header templates| ]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

To include this template on a page, use the following code:

== Notes == This template should only be used on category pages. Make sure the title of the category page includes the demonym and century so that the template can correctly infer these values. Right now, the category isn't smart enough to handle some redirected categories. In those cases, wrapping the template with <nowiki>{{suppress categories| TEMPLATE}}</nowiki> is one temporary workaround.

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Intricate template}} == General Usage == This template is used to categorize diffusing categories for people by their nationality and century on category pages. It ''should'' produce the correct links and categories for the specific country and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== General Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == This template should only be used on category pages. Make sure the title of the category page includes the demonym and century so that the template can correctly infer these values. Right now, the category isn't smart enough to handle some redirected categories. In those cases, wrapping the template with <nowiki>{{suppress categories| TEMPLATE}}</nowiki> is one temporary workaround.
== See also == {{Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line --> [[Category:People by nationality and century| ]] [[Category:Occupation category header templates| ]] }}</includeonly>

{{Intricate template}} == General Usage == This template is used to categorize diffusing categories for people by their nationality and century on category pages. It ''should'' produce the correct links and categories for the specific country and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:

== Notes == This template should only be used on category pages. Make sure the title of the category page includes the demonym and century so that the template can correctly infer these values. Right now, the category isn't smart enough to handle some redirected categories. In those cases, wrapping the template with <nowiki>{{suppress categories| TEMPLATE}}</nowiki> is one temporary workaround.

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Intricate template}} == General Usage == This template is used to categorize diffusing categories for people by their nationality and century on category pages. It ''should'' produce the correct links and categories for the specific country and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== General Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == This template should only be used on category pages. Make sure the title of the category page includes the demonym and century so that the template can correctly infer these values. Right now, the category isn't smart enough to handle some redirected categories. In those cases, wrapping the template with <nowiki>{{suppress categories| TEMPLATE}}</nowiki> is one temporary workaround.
== See also == {{Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:People by nationality and century| ]] [[Category:Occupation category header templates| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Intricate template}} == General Usage == This template is used to categorize diffusing categories for people by their nationality and century on category pages. It ''should'' produce the correct links and categories for the specific country and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== General Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{People by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == This template should only be used on category pages. Make sure the title of the category page includes the demonym and century so that the template can correctly infer these values. Right now, the category isn't smart enough to handle some redirected categories. In those cases, wrapping the template with <nowiki>{{suppress categories| TEMPLATE}}</nowiki> is one temporary workaround.
== See also == {{Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:People by nationality and century| ]] [[Category:Occupation category header templates| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
